falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 5200 on any daily session
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern typically featured shallow retracements with 5200 as structural support; a break below invalidates the fractal similarity and suggests a deeper corrective phase than the reference pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 25 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom formed with VIX peaking near 23 and rapidly mean-reverting; sustained elevation above 25 indicates fear regime inconsistent with the pattern's volatility compression signature

The reference bottom coincided with curve steepening from deeply negative levels; renewed flattening/inversion would signal credit stress and recession pricing absent from the August 2024 regime, breaking the macro analog

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
